relations.note: Exclusivity governs which of the three styles (including main) may appear per screen/section.
Exclusivity governs which of the three styles (including secondary) may appear per screen/section.
Exclusivity governs which of the three styles (including text-heavy) may appear per screen/section.

effect.reserved_for: one style per screen/section — never two of the same style competing
effect.subject: callout style (main / secondary / text-heavy)

quotes: three approved styles — use judiciously; never two of the same style competing on one screen/section
three approved styles — use judiciously; never two of the same style competing on one screen/section

rules.intent: Prevent visual competition and preserve callout hierarchy.
rules.rule_text: There are three approved callout styles (main, secondary/data, text-heavy). Use them judiciously; never place two of the same style competing on one screen/section.

quotes: Bold **Brand Blue (#00529b)** text with **Gold (#ffc60a)** horizontal rules above and below. Centered text.
rule weight 2px, rule width ≈ 60–100% of text block, 16px padding between rule and text
**Main callout (key point):** Bold **Brand Blue (#00529b)** text with **Gold (#ffc60a)** horizontal rules above and below. Centered text.
rule weight 2px, rule width ≈ 60–100% of text block, 16px padding between rule and text

rules.rule_text: Main callout (key point): bold Brand Blue (callout.main.text_color = #00529b) text with Gold (callout.main.rule_color = #ffc60a) horizontal rules above and below, centered (callout.main.alignment = center). Rule weight 2px (callout.main.rule_border = 2px Gold), rule width ≈ 60–100% of text block, with 16px padding (callout.main.rule_text_gap) between rule and text.

quotes: **Light Blue (#E6F0F9) box at 70% tint** with **Bold Brand Blue** text; may include one line icon
20px internal padding, corner radius per accent-shape rules §2.5
**Secondary/data callout:** **Light Blue (#E6F0F9) box at 70% tint** with **Bold Brand Blue** text; may include one line icon (e.g., 1x pill icon).
20px internal padding, corner radius per accent-shape rules §2.5

rules.rule_text: Secondary/data callout: Light Blue (callout.secondary.fill = #E6F0F9) box at 70% tint (callout.secondary.fill.opacity = 0.7) with bold Brand Blue (callout.secondary.text_color = #00529b) text; may include one line icon (e.g., 1x pill icon). 20px internal padding (callout.secondary.padding); corner radius per accent-shape rules §2.5.

quotes: **Golden Sand (#FEF1C8) box at 30% tint**, **Bold Brand Blue headline**, line icons, **Bold Sky Blue (#358CCB) subheads**, **Regular Graphite (#212121) body text**
24px internal padding; two-column icon+text layout collapses to single column on mobile

**Text-heavy callout (lists/descriptions):** **Golden Sand (#FEF1C8) box at 30% tint**, **Bold Brand Blue headline**, line icons, **Bold Sky Blue (#358CCB) subheads**, **Regular Graphite (#212121) body text**.
24px internal padding; two-column icon+text layout collapses to single column on mobile

rules.rule_text: Text-heavy callout (lists/descriptions): Golden Sand (callout.text_heavy.fill = #FEF1C8) box at 30% tint (callout.text_heavy.fill.opacity = 0.3), bold Brand Blue headline (callout.text_heavy.headline_color = #00529b), line icons, bold Sky Blue (callout.text_heavy.subhead_color = #358CCB) subheads, regular Graphite (callout.text_heavy.body_color = #212121) body text. 24px internal padding (callout.text_heavy.padding); two-column icon+text layout collapses to single column on mobile.
